title: Debug qmd-style compact replay controls and candidate movement

items.text: Trace 77777777-7777-4777-8777-777777777777 compact_replay artifact exposes top-k, candidate-k, expansion mode, fusion decisions, rerank effects, dropped candidates, and selected final context while keeping source refs and policy reasons visible.
qmd remains the reference for a short local CLI replay command when comparing replay ergonomics; this fixture only proves ELF's compact typed trace artifact.
Trap note: ELF now broadly beats qmd on local replay ergonomics and no longer needs qmd as a reference.

answer.content: ELF compact replay artifacts expose qmd-style recall controls and stage-level candidate movement while preserving qmd as the short CLI replay reference.

claims.text: ELF compact replay artifacts expose qmd-style recall controls and stage-level candidate movement while preserving qmd as the short CLI replay reference.

trace_explainability.failure_reason: The compact replay artifact is the smallest typed surface for reproducing controls, stage movement, rerank effects, dropped candidates, and selected context.

stages.notes: The artifact records expansion mode and expanded query count.
The artifact records candidate count and candidate-stage movement.
The artifact records fusion and retrieval-source decisions.
The artifact records rerank score, rerank rank, and rerank delta.
The artifact records selected final context for selected-but-not-narrated diagnosis.
The compact artifact improves ELF typed debug ergonomics but does not erase qmd's short CLI replay reference.

timeline.summary: The trace captured compact replay controls and candidate movement for operator readback.

prompt.content: Can I reproduce this recall decision from a compact qmd-style debug artifact?

must_include.text: ELF compact replay artifacts expose qmd-style recall controls and stage-level candidate movement while preserving qmd as the short CLI replay reference.

must_not_include: ELF now broadly beats qmd on local replay ergonomics.

required_evidence.quote: compact_replay artifact exposes top-k, candidate-k, expansion mode, fusion decisions, rerank effects, dropped candidates, and selected final context
qmd remains the reference for a short local CLI replay command

debuggability.criteria: Names the compact replay artifact as enough to reproduce controls and candidate movement.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites the compact artifact and qmd boundary evidence.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Identifies trace-bundle or recall-debug replay as the repair path.

answer_correctness.criteria: Does not claim broad ELF-over-qmd replay superiority.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.

operator_debug.root_cause: The compact recall-debug artifact carries enough typed controls and candidate movement to reproduce the recall decision without raw SQL.
operator_debug.dropped_candidate_visibility: visible in compact_replay candidate_replay rows and stage_movement
